name: Fried Chicken Bilao
description: Crispy, golen-brown on the outside and perfectly juicy in the inside.Served with gravy.

name: Pancit Sotanghon Bilao
description: A beloved Filipino stir-fry made with mung bean glass noodles, mixed with fresh vegetables like carrots, cabbage, and bell peppers, along with savory meats.

name: Pancit Bam-I Bilao
description: A hearty noodle dish featuring a delicious combination of both canton and bihon noodles, loaded with savory meats and fresh veggies.

name: Fish Fillet Bilao
description: Golden crispy-fried fish slices served lightly battered and incredibly tender inside.

name: Chicken Fillet Bilao
description: Tender, boneless chicken breast strips fried to a perfect golden crisp.

name: Cordon Bleu Bilao
description: Crispy breaded chicken breast rolled with savory ham and warm, melted cheese.

name: Pork Lollipop Bilao
description: Fun, meaty pork cuts playfully shaped, seasoned, filled with cheese, and deep fried to perfection.

name: Pork Laroca Bilao
description: A savory, deep-fried pork specialty with a signature crunch that keeps people coming back for more.

name: Buttered Shrimp Bilao
description: Plump, fresh shrimp sauteed in a rich, savory, and garlicky butter sauce.

name: Lumpiang Shanghai Bilao
description: Crispy, bite golden spring rolls packed with savory ground pork.

name: Vegetable Lumpia Bilao
description: Fresh, crunchy mixed vegetables wrapped and fried to a perfect golden crunch.

name: Pork Humba Bilao
description: Slow-cooked, melt-in-your-mouth pork belly bathed in a rich, sweet, and savory soy-glaze.

name: Sweet & Sour Bilao
description: Crispy meat chunks coated in a vibrant, tangy, and sweet sauce with fresh bell peppers, carrots and pineapples.

name: Escabeche Bilao
description: Freshly fried fish drenched in a vibrant, sweet and tangy suace with colorful julienned vegetables

name: Menudo Bilao
description: A comforting classic of tender pork, potatoes, and carrots simmered in a rich tomato sauce.

name: Pork Meatballs(Bola2x) Bilao
description: Savory, perfectly seasoned ground pork bites served in a rich and flavorful sauce.

name: Chopsuey Bilao
description: A colorful, healthy medley of fresh, crisp vegetables stir-friend in a savory thickened sauce.

name: Spaghetti Bilao
description: Classic sweet-style Filipino spaghetti with a rich, meaty tomato sauce, and plenty og grated cheese.
